name: tomatoku
description: トマトオク - 5×5に🍅を置く短時間ブラウザパズル

scripts.gen:v2: npm run gen:v2:patterns && npm run gen:v2:candidates && npm run gen:v2:bank
scripts.test: node scripts/game.test.js && node scripts/ranking.test.js && node scripts/launch-config.test.js && node scripts/accessibility.test.js && npm run test:generator-v2
scripts.test:generator-v2: npm run test:generator-v2:foundation && npm run test:generator-v2:regions && npm run test:generator-v2:bank
